Nf6 === Black has developed his knight, to prevent White from taking the black pawn on e4. === Statistics === ==== Win chances ==== White 43%, Black 39%, Draw 18%.https://www.365chess.com/opening.php?m=6&n=300&ms=d4.d5.e4.dxe4.Nc3&ns=7.8.75.132.300 ==== Next move probability ==== f3 87%, Bg5 10%, Bc4 1%, all other moves less than 1%.https://www.365chess.com/opening.php?m=7&n=341&ms=d4.d5.e4.dxe4.Nc3.Nf6&ns=7.8.75.132.300.341 == Theory table == {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}.
